info.title: Azure File Storage
info.description: Azure File Storage provides scalable file shares in the cloud using SMB and NFS protocols.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the service account, share, directory or file that is the target of the desired operation.

get.description: Reads or downloads a file from the system, including its metadata and properties.

parameters.name: x-ms-version
parameters.description: Specifies the version of the operation to use for this request.

parameters.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.

parameters.description: The timeout parameter is expressed in seconds.

parameters.description: Valid values are 'backup'.

put.description: Creates a new share under the specified account. If the share with the same name already exists, the operation fails.

parameters.name: x-ms-version
parameters.description: Specifies the version of the operation to use for this request.

parameters.name: x-ms-client-request-id
parameters.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: The timeout parameter is expressed in seconds.

parameters.name: x-ms-meta
parameters.description: Optional. User-defined metadata for the resource.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-request-intent
parameters.description: Valid values are 'backup'.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-quota
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum size of the share, in gigabytes.

parameters.name: x-ms-access-tier
parameters.description: Specifies the access tier of the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-enabled-protocols
parameters.description: Specifies which protocols are enabled on the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-root-squash
parameters.description: Specifies the SquashMode for the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-permission
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set file permission for shares that use POSIX ACLs.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-attributes
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set file attributes for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-creation-time
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set file creation time for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-last-write-time
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set file last write time for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-change-time
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set file change time for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-permission-format
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set permission format for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-provisioned-iops
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set provisioned IOPS for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-provisioned-bandwidth-mibps
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set provisioned bandwidth for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-paid-bursting-enabled
parameters.description: Optional. Used to enable paid bursting for shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-paid-bursting-max-iops
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set max IOPS for paid bursting.

parameters.name: x-ms-paid-bursting-max-bandwidth-mibps
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set max bandwidth for paid bursting.

parameters.name: x-ms-enable-snapshot-virtual-directory-access
parameters.description: Optional. Used to enable snapshot virtual directory access.

parameters.name: x-ms-enable-smb-directory-lease
parameters.description: Optional. Used to enable SMB directory lease.

get.description: Returns all user-defined metadata and system properties for the specified share or share snapshot.

parameters.name: x-ms-version
parameters.description: Specifies the version of the operation to use for this request.

parameters.name: x-ms-client-request-id
parameters.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.

parameters.name: sharesnapshot
parameters.description: The snapshot parameter is an opaque DateTime value that specifies a share snapshot.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: The timeout parameter is expressed in seconds.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-request-intent
parameters.description: Valid values are 'backup'.

parameters.name: x-ms-lease-id
parameters.description: If specified, the lease ID must match the lease ID of the file.

x-ms-access-tier.description: The access tier of the share.

x-ms-client-request-id.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.

x-ms-enable-smb-directory-lease.description: Whether SMB directory lease is enabled.

x-ms-enable-snapshot-virtual-directory-a.description: Whether snapshot virtual directory access is enabled.

x-ms-enabled-protocols.description: The enabled protocols for the share.

x-ms-max-burst-credits-for-iops.description: The maximum burst credits for IOPS.

x-ms-meta.description: Optional. User-defined metadata for the resource.

x-ms-paid-bursting-max-bandwidth-mibps.description: The maximum bandwidth for paid bursting.

x-ms-paid-bursting-max-iops.description: The maximum IOPS for paid bursting.

x-ms-request-id.description: An opaque, globally-unique, server-generated string identifier for the request.

x-ms-root-squash.description: The root squash mode for the share.

x-ms-share-next-allowed-provisioned-band.description: The next allowed provisioned bandwidth downgrade time.

x-ms-share-next-allowed-provisioned-iops.description: The next allowed provisioned IOPS downgrade time.

x-ms-share-next-allowed-quota-downgrade-.description: The next allowed quota downgrade time.

x-ms-share-provisioned-bandwidth-mibps.description: The provisioned bandwidth for the share.

x-ms-share-provisioned-egress-mbps.description: The provisioned egress for the share.

x-ms-share-provisioned-ingress-mbps.description: The provisioned ingress for the share.

x-ms-share-provisioned-iops.description: The provisioned IOPS for the share.

x-ms-share-quota.description: The maximum quota for the share.

delete.description: Operation marks the specified share or share snapshot for deletion. The share or share snapshot and any files contained within it are later deleted during garbage collection.

Start.description: The date-time the policy is active.

Permission.description: The permissions for the ACL policy.

AccessRight.description: Access rights of the access policy.

CorsRule.description:
CORS is an HTTP feature that enables a web application running under one domain
to access resources in another domain. Web browsers implement a security
restriction known as same-origin policy that prevents a web page from calling
APIs in a different domain; CORS provides a secure way to allow one domain (the
origin domain) to call APIs in another domain.

AllowedOrigins.description:
The origin domains that are permitted to make a request against the storage
service via CORS. The origin domain is the domain from which the request
originates. Note that the origin must be an exact case-sensitive match with the
origin that the user age sends to the service. You can also use the wildcard
character '*' to allow all origin domains to make requests via CORS.

AllowedMethods.description:
The methods (HTTP request verbs) that the origin domain may use for a CORS
request. (comma separated)

AllowedHeaders.description: The request headers that the origin domain may specify on the CORS request.

ExposedHeaders.description:
The response headers that may be sent in the response to the CORS request and
exposed by the browser to the request issuer.

MaxAgeInSeconds.description:
The maximum amount time that a browser should cache the preflight OPTIONS
request.

Content-Length.description:
Content length of the file. This value may not be up-to-date since an SMB
client may have modified the file locally. The value of Content-Length may not
reflect that fact until the handle is closed or the op-lock is broken. To
retrieve current property values, call Get File Properties.

FilesAndDirectoriesListSegment.description: Abstract for entries that can be listed from Directory.

HandleItem.description: A listed Azure Storage handle item.

FileId.description: FileId uniquely identifies the file or directory.

ParentId.description: ParentId uniquely identifies the parent directory of the object.

SessionId.description: SMB session ID in context of which the file handle was opened

ClientIp.description: Client IP that opened the handle

ClientName.description: Name of the client machine where the share is being mounted

OpenTime.description:
Time when the session that previously opened the handle has last been
reconnected. (UTC)

LastReconnectTime.description: Time handle was last connected to (UTC)

Start.description: The date-time the key is active in ISO 8601 UTC time

Expiry.description: The date-time the key expires in ISO 8601 UTC time

DelegatedUserTid.description: The delegated user tenant id in Azure AD

LeaseDurationType.description:
When a share is leased, specifies whether the lease is of infinite or fixed
duration.

LeaseStatusType.description: The current lease status of the share.

ListFilesAndDirectoriesSegmentResponse.description: An enumeration of directories and files.

Segment.description: Abstract for entries that can be listed from Directory.

Metrics.description: Storage Analytics metrics for file service.

Version.description: The version of Storage Analytics to configure.

Enabled.description: Indicates whether metrics are enabled for the File service.

IncludeAPIs.description:
Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API
operations.

Enabled.description:
Indicates whether a retention policy is enabled for the File service. If false,
metrics data is retained, and the user is responsible for deleting it.

Days.description:
Indicates the number of days that metrics data should be retained. All data
older than this value will be deleted. Metrics data is deleted on a best-effort
basis after the retention period expires.

ShareItemInternal.description: A listed Azure Storage share item.

EncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

ShareNfsSettingsEncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

Required.description: If encryption in transit is required

SharePermission.description: A permission (a security descriptor) at the share level.

permission.description: The permission in the Security Descriptor Definition Language (SDDL).

LeaseStatus.description: The current lease status of the share.

LeaseDuration.description:
When a share is leased, specifies whether the lease is of infinite or fixed
duration.

EncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

ShareSmbSettingsEncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

Required.description: If encryption in transit is required

ShareUsageBytes.description:
The approximate size of the data stored in bytes. Note that this value may not
include all recently created or recently resized files.

StorageErrorCode.description: Error codes returned by the service

HourMetrics.description: A summary of request statistics grouped by API in hourly aggregates for files.

MinuteMetrics.description: A summary of request statistics grouped by API in minute aggregates for files.

SignedOid.description: The Azure Active Directory object ID in GUID format.

SignedTid.description: The Azure Active Directory tenant ID in GUID format

SignedStart.description: The date-time the key is active

SignedService.description: Abbreviation of the Azure Storage service that accepts the key

SignedVersion.description: The service version that created the key

SignedDelegatedUserTid.description:
The delegated user tenant id in Azure AD. Return if DelegatedUserTid is
specified.

Value.description: The key as a base64 string
